title: Update EoSB1 process for new versionCode strategy
description: The updateconfig.py script now handles versionCodes differently after the Gradle upgrade. The EoSB1 document needs to reflect the new strategy.

title: Migrate pilot branch from madf/pilot to extra/pilot
description: Team agreed to standardize on extra/pilot-x.xx.x naming. madf/pilot is being deprecated. Documentation needs update.

title: Investigate token refresh failure on Android 14
description: Silent token refresh fails on Android 14 due to background process restrictions. Auth flow documentation may need update.

title: Add Shell Go+ multiplier tier documentation
description: New Shell Go+ tier structure introduced in v2. Rewards overview doc does not cover the multiplier logic.

title: Rewards SDK v2.4 breaking changes
description: SDK v2.4 deprecated the old redemption endpoint. Both Android and iOS updated. Architecture doc still references v2.3 endpoint.

title: Lokalise export now supports Android XML plurals
description: The lokalise-export workflow was updated to support quantity strings. The process documentation does not mention plural handling.

title: Rotate Azure Key Vault credentials for Android build
description: Scheduled rotation of ANDROID_PROD_SIGNING_KEY and ANDROID_PROD_KEYSTORE_PASS. Rotation procedure documented but needs verification.

title: QA smoke test checklist v2 for EoSB builds
description: QA team updated the smoke test checklist to include new payment flows. EoSB1 doc references old checklist v1.
